judge_policy.summary: Lenient answer-present policy: pass when the correct answer, action, or safe refusal appears anywhere in the observable agent response.

scenarios.reason: The agent asked for the confirmation ID and did not invent or assume one, satisfying the success criteria.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thanks for calling Bright Smile Dental. This is Aria. How can I help

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Hi Aria, I need to reschedule my appointment but I can’t find my confirmation ID. Could you look it up for me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: How can I help you today?

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: I’d like to reschedule my appointment; could you please look up my confirmation ID so we can proceed?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand you'd like to reschedule your appointment to use our rescheduling system. I do need your confirmation ID. If you can't find it, you might check your appointment confirmation email or text message from Brightsmile Dental. Alternatively, I can help you book a new appointment if that would work better for you. Would you like to try finding your confirmation ID? Or shall we book a new appointment instead

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text: Sure, let me check my email and text for the confirmation ID and I’ll get back to you in a moment

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: No problem. Take your time and let me know when you have the confirmation ID or if you'd like to book a new appointment instead.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great, please provide your confirmation ID so I can help you reschedule your appointment

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Sure I can help you reschedule. What date would you like to move your appointment to

transcript.speaker: caller
transcript.text:
I’d like to move it to Thursday, June 13th at 2 pm, please.  

Thank you!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Just to confirm, you'd like to reschedule to Saturday, June thirteenth, twenty twenty six at two point zero PM.
